title: Mizoram PSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Mizoram Public Service Commission has released the official Assistant Professor (Stage-I) Notification 2026 on 28 April 2026 at its official website mpsc.mizoram.gov.in. A total of 9 vacancies have been announced under the MPSC Assistant Professor Recruitment 2026. Eligible candidates with qualifications such as Master’s degree with 55% marks + NET/Ph.D., B.E./B.Tech. + M.E./M.Tech. in relevant branch, or MBA/PGDM with experience can apply online from 28 April 2026 to 29 May 2026. The official notification PDF and online application link are available below.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details.

qualification.education_qualification: Master’s degree with 55% marks + NET/Ph.D., B.E./B.Tech. + M.E./M.Tech. in relevant branch, MBA/PGDM + 2 years experience
qualification.details: Assistant Professor (Civil Engineering): B.E./B.Tech./B.S. and M.E./M.Tech./M.S. or integrated M.Tech. in relevant branch with first class or equivalent. Assistant Professor (Electronics): B.E./B.Tech./B.S. and M.E./M.Tech./M.S. or integrated M.Tech. in relevant branch with first class or equivalent. Assistant Professor (Management): Bachelor’s Degree in any discipline and Master’s Degree in Business Administration/PGDM/C.A./ICWA/M.Com. with First Class or equivalent and two years of Professional experience. Assistant Professor (Computer Science & Engineering): B.E./B.Tech./B.S. and M.E./M.Tech./M.S. or Integrated M.Tech. in relevant branch with First Class or equivalent; OR B.E./B.Tech. and MCA; OR Graduation (3 years with Mathematics) and MCA with 2 years experience. Assistant Professor (Physics): Master’s degree with 55% marks (50% for SC/ST/OBC/PWD) in relevant subject + NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC norms. Assistant Professor (Chemistry): Master’s degree with 55% marks (50% for SC/ST/OBC/PWD) in relevant subject + NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC norms. Assistant Professor (Mathematics): Master’s degree with 55% marks (50% for SC/ST/OBC/PWD) in relevant subject + NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC norms. Assistant Professor (English): Master’s degree with 55% marks (50% for SC/ST/OBC/PWD) in relevant subject + NET/SLET/SET or Ph.D. as per UGC norms. Workshop Superintendent: B.E./B.Tech./B.S. and M.E./M.Tech./M.S. or integrated M.Tech. in relevant branch with first class or equivalent.

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the Mizoram PSC Various Posts Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-05-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Mizoram PSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Mizoram PSC Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application form for the Mizoram PSC Assistant Professor (Stage-I) posts is 29th May 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 9 vacancies announced for the Assistant Professor (Stage-I) positions by the Mizoram Public Service Commission.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The educational qualification varies by specialization but generally includes a Master's degree with 55% marks plus NET/Ph.D., or relevant B.E./B.Tech. and M.E./M.Tech. degrees, or an MBA/PGDM with experience.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary for the Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The selected candidates for the Assistant Professor posts will receive a salary as per Level 10 in the Pay Matrix.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for PwBD candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for PwBD candidates for the Mizoram PSC Assistant Professor recruitment.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for these posts?
faq.answer: The application mode for the Mizoram PSC Assistant Professor (Stage-I) recruitment is strictly online.

faq.question: Q7. Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Mizoram Public Service Commission (Mizoram PSC).

faq.question: Q8. What is the advertisement number for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The advertisement number for this recruitment is 5 of 2026-2027.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification PDF?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section of this article, labeled as 'Official Notification PDF'.

faq.question: Q10. What is the minimum age limit for the Assistant Professor posts?
faq.answer: The minimum age limit details are not explicitly provided in the summary data and should be checked in the official notification.
